name: Sam Garlen | Scars on Scars
description:
A late exit from school proves to be a good decision on your part, allowing an otherwise unlikely encounter to occur. Though humans and anthros populate this town together, you never expected to find one in such a vulnerable state, no less in your own school, and no less such a weak, pitiable rabbit.

I finished The Leaves of Fall today, if you couldn't tell. Sam may have been promoted to Sucrose/Sayori status, I adore the bunny so goddamn much even if TLoF made me only sadder that I will never find a girlfriend, furry or otherwise. I would absolutely make more Sam bots if I could find other good thumbnails for her.

This takes place before the main story, before Anon or Mike are in the picture. I just wanted to pretend I could have someone like her in my life. Also, go read The Leaves of Fall by Oliver_Hart on SoFurry. Please, it's a bloody masterpiece and what I strive for my works to one day be, just a little more traditionally structured.

God I need shy traumatized anthro bunny in my life.

CW: Abuse (physical and emotional), self-harm, scars.
creator: MrShiny
